name: plan-skills
description: Role-based Agent Swarm and adversarial validation skills that drive features through a spec → plan → execute → audit → ship lifecycle.

plugins.name: plan
plugins.description: A Swarm of role-based skills (product-owner, architect, engineer, simplifier, auditor) plus adversarial spec/plan/implementation validators that drive a feature, bug fix, or refactor through a gated spec → plan → execute → audit → commit lifecycle.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: A Supervisor skill plus self-contained phase skills (research, discovery, planning, construction, release) that orchestrate the sibling 'plan' plugin's specialist skills into a single gated spec → plan → build → ship lifecycle.
